scripts.generate:api-types: UV_CACHE_DIR=${UV_CACHE_DIR:-./.uv-cache} uv --project ../backend run python ../backend/scripts/generate_backend_types.py | openapi-typescript --output src/types/_generated/openapi.d.ts
scripts.e2e:audio:all: npm run e2e:player-mobile:audio && npm run e2e:encounters:audio && npm run e2e:encounters:audio:chromium && npm run e2e:encounters:audio:webkit
scripts.e2e:encounters:audio: ENCOUNTERS_AUDIO_TEST=1 playwright test test/end_to_end/encounters.spec.ts --grep ENCOUNTERS-TALKING-AUDIO-01 --config playwright.audio.config.js
scripts.e2e:encounters:audio:billing: ENCOUNTERS_AUDIO_TEST=1 playwright test test/end_to_end/encounters.spec.ts --grep ENCOUNTERS-BILLING --config playwright.audio.config.js --project=chromium
scripts.e2e:encounters:audio:chromium: ENCOUNTERS_AUDIO_TEST=1 playwright test test/end_to_end/encounters.spec.ts --grep ENCOUNTERS-TALKING-AUDIO-01 --config playwright.audio.config.js --project=chromium
scripts.e2e:encounters:audio:webkit: ENCOUNTERS_AUDIO_TEST=1 playwright test test/end_to_end/encounters.spec.ts --grep ENCOUNTERS-TALKING-AUDIO-01 --config playwright.audio.config.js --project=webkit
